  • Uses of Json in uz.maniac4j.alivejson.build

    Classes in uz.maniac4j.alivejson.build that implement Json
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    Fallback
    JSON decorator that returns a fallback value if a key or index is missing.
    final class 
    Strict
    JSON decorator that fails fast if a key or index is not found.
    final class 
    With
    JSON with an added key-value pair.
    final class 
    Without
    JSON without a specific key.
